failures.description: The run failed because the ProductCatalogSearch dependency timed out, so the agent could not retrieve the catalog evidence needed to identify the cheapest available skateboard.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The first failure appears at step 3, where the agent attempts the correct tool call and receives an explicit infrastructure/runtime error: "catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms" with type "CatalogServiceTimeoutError". This is not a malformed invocation, because the tool arguments match the plan and are well-formed. It is also not an intent or planning error, because the user goal is correctly understood and the planned action is appropriate. Looking ahead, the timeout is never resolved; the Executor simply returns failure and the Evaluator rejects the run based on missing tool evidence. Therefore the unresolved root cause is a system/connectivity failure at step 3.
